summary: Technical problem affecting access to disk storage systems.

updates.details: Updates on the data incident of 18 November, and the recovery activity to restore affected data to the CEDA Archive, can be found by following this link to recent updates:

summary: Workspaces scheduled for migration are unavailable during cutover window.

updates.details: Check the schedule to see dates for specific workspaces.

summary: Advance notice of next regular scheduled maintenance day

updates.details: Scheduled maintenance day Tuesday 14 July 2026: expect disruption to all CEDA & JASMIN services. Please plan your work accordingly.

summary: Issues over weekend, some processes delayed.

updates.details: Service still degraded & under continuing investigation. Expect further interruptions until further notice.
Issue not yet resolved, new tasks can be added to the queue but the queue is now very long and will take some time to process.

summary: Public Holidays 4th & 25 May 2026 - services running at risk.

updates.details: Public Holidays on Mondays 4th & 25th May mean that staff will be on leave and services will be running at risk with no helpdesk cover. Normal cover should resume the following days in each case.

summary: Emergency reboots for essential software update.

updates.details: Selected hosts have already been rebooted overnight which may have interrupted some user sessions/workflows. Further reboots may be necessary at short notice: please look out for console announcements.

summary: JDMA & ET not currently available for retrieval

updates.details: JDMA & ET are not currently available for retrieval, but are for ingest.
